2606.14886.title: Improved Knowledge Distillation for Land-Use Image Classification
2606.14886.paper_summary: In the present article, an improved Knowledge Distillation (KD) framework has been proposed for efficient compression of deep convolutional neural networks for land-use image classification task. Motivated by the need to achieve competitive classification accuracy while reducing computational complexity, a teacher-student learning paradigm is adopted in which a VGG16 network transfers knowledge to a lightweight MobileNetV2 model. The proposed framework integrates hard supervision from ground truth labels with a soft supervision strategy that combines Kullback-Leibler divergence and Cosine Similarity losses. Experiments conducted on three land-use datasets show that the proposed KD-based method yields improved performance, and achieves an accuracy of 99.04%, outperforming both baseline student training and single-loss distillation approaches, while retaining substantial model compression.
2606.14886.paper_summary_zh: 在本篇文章中，提出了一個改進的知識蒸餾（KD）框架，用於高效壓縮深度卷積神經網絡，以應對土地利用圖像分類任務。出於在降低計算複雜度的同時實現競爭性分類準確度的需求，採用了教師-學生學習範式，其中VGG16網絡將知識轉移到輕量級的MobileNetV2模型。所提出的框架將來自真實標籤的硬監督與結合Kullback-Leibler散度和餘弦相似度損失的軟監督策略整合在一起。在三個土地利用數據集上進行的實驗表明，所提出的基於KD的方法產生了改進的性能，並達到了99.04%的準確率，超越了基準學生訓練和單一損失蒸餾方法，同時保持了可觀的模型壓縮。
2606.14886.author: Arundhuti Sur et.al.
2606.14886.authors: Arundhuti Sur, Abhiroop Chatterjee, Susmita Ghosh, Emmett Ientilucci
